title: gateway/aprs_is: alt_ft conversion magic number needs comment
description: In aprs_is.rs:139-143, the calculation (self.alt_dm as i32 * 328084) / 1_000_000 uses a magic number. Add comment explaining: '1 decimeter = 0.328084 feet'
close_reason: Comment already present at line 140: '// 1 decimeter = 0.328084 feet'. The magic number 328084 in the calculation (self.alt_dm as i32 * 328084) / 1_000_000 is explained.
